_comment: Example 3 — Internal HR system. Employee PII, internal-only, moderate impact. Exercises: internal-only architecture (no CloudFront), single-region recovery, SOC2 + NIST CSF 2.0 compliance scope, employee record handling.

business.businessProblem: Centralises performance reviews, comp planning, and workforce reporting across the company.
business.userInteractionDescription: Employees log in over the corporate SSO to view records, submit reviews, and access reports.

impact.confidentialityWorstCase: Disclosure of comp data damages employee trust and creates HR/legal exposure.
impact.integrityWorstCase: Incorrect comp/performance data drives bad decisions; competitive disadvantage.
impact.availabilityWorstCase: Minor — employees can wait a workday before serious impact.
